didxWallet.about.emailHeader.message: Reach out from DIDx DFID Wallet
comments: Email subject when contacting support from DIDx DFID wallet
origin.translation: Neem kontak op vanuit DIDx DFID Beursie
origin.message: This app was created by DIDx in the context of the DFID ‘Wallet Prototype’. It serves as a prototype for future wallet providers. All code is available under Apache 2.0.
comments: About screen description text for the DIDx wallet
origin.translation: Hierdie program is deur DIDx geskep in die konteks van die DFID 'Beursie-prototipe'. Dit dien as 'n prototipe vir toekomstige beursie-verskaffers. Al die kode is beskikbaar onder Apache 2.0.
